daily.today_energy: Your cosmic vibe is all about authenticity today, Sag. The universe is giving you permission to show up exactly as you are—messy thoughts and all. Trust your gut instincts; they're unusually sharp rn.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, there's a sweetness in the air around genuine connection. If you've been holding back how you really feel, today whispers that vulnerability might just be your superpower.
daily.career: Your creative energy is flowing, but watch out for overthinking. You've got momentum—the kind that rewards bold moves. That project or idea you've been hesitant about? The stars say it's worth exploring.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement and play, not punishment. Think less "gym era" and more "vibe check." Dancing, walking, stretching—anything that feels like self-care rather than obligation will boost your whole system.

weekly.overview: Your vibe is shifting toward authenticity this week, babe. The cosmos is basically asking you to drop the act and lean into what actually makes you feel alive. Expect some meaningful realizations.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or single, there's a cosmic nudge toward deeper conversations. If you've been holding back how you really feel, this is your sign to speak up. Vulnerability hits different rn.
weekly.career: Creative energy is flowing, and your ideas are actually hitting. This is the week to pitch that project or initiative you've been sitting on. Trust your instincts—they're surprisingly sharp right now.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for movement and fresh air. Whether it's a walk, dancing, or whatever gets you grounded, honor that call. Mental clarity comes easier when you're actually taking care of yourself.
